home bio research gallery

updates

⚇ they have the computers - radio interview ( March 2026 ) ⚇

the wonderful Genia intereviewed me for their project on permacomputing and sound for rtm.fm! give it a listen!


⚇ noisy spaces - musica manchester university ( March 2026 ) ⚇

I performed my performance lecture Noisy Spaces at Musica Festival hosted at Manchester University!


⚇ narrowcasting: a multi-band narrative ( January 2026 ) ⚇

Agnes and I wrote an essay / technical document / manifesto / assemblage text called Narrowcasting thats just been published in Robida Collective’s new book Transmissions: Radio Essays on Edges, Crossings and Narrowcasting Borderlands. Available here!
